title: euphrasia × brevipila f. eglandulosa
intro: Euphrasia × brevipila f. eglandulosa, a hybrid species of flowering plant, is a subspecies of Euphrasia brevipila, commonly known as the small-flowered eyebright. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Euphrasia × brevipila f. eglandulosa include its ability to soothe eye irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the health of the respiratory and digestive systems. Euphrasia × brevipila f. eglandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
